headline: Prudential Financial Extends Japan Sales Freeze 180 Days, Pulls EPS Target; Warns of $1B Hit
summary: Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) executives said they will extend a voluntary suspension of new sales at Prudential of Japan (POJ) by an additional 180 days, through Nov. 5, as the company undertakes what CEO Andy Sullivan described as a “meaningful transformation and further oversight” of the busine
